page_metadata.bioconda__summary: BLAST+ is a new suite of BLAST tools that utilizes the NCBI C++ Toolkit.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A tool that finds regions of similarity between biological sequences. The program compares nucleotide or protein sequences to sequence databases and calculates the statistical significance.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A tool that finds regions of similarity between biological sequences. The program compares nucleotide or protein sequences to sequence databases and calculates the statistical significance.
